import { useCart } from '../CartContext'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const formatPrice = (price) => { return new Intl.NumberFormat('fr-FR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'EUR', minimumFractionDigits: 2 }).format(price); }; function Cart() { const { cart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity } = useCart(); const subtotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (parseFloat(item.price) * item.quantity), 0); const tax = subtotal * 0.1; const total = subtotal + tax; if (cart.length === 0) { return (

Your Selection

Your cart is empty.

Continue Shopping
); } return (

Your Selection

{cart.length} {cart.length === 1 ? 'Item' : 'Items'}

{/* Left: Items */}
{cart.map((item, i) => (

{item.product_name}

SIZE   {item.size}

QUANTITY
{item.quantity}

SUBTOTAL

{formatPrice(parseFloat(item.price) * item.quantity)}

))}
{/* Right: Order Summary */}

Order Summary

Subtotal {formatPrice(subtotal)}
Estimated Tax {formatPrice(tax)}
Shipping Complimentary
Total {formatPrice(total)}
Proceed to Checkout Continue Shopping

Complimentary Shipping

Free express delivery

Secure Payment

Protected transactions

Luxury Packaging

Signature presentation

); } export default Cart;
